title: Beetroot Toast Delight
description: A sweet and tender beetroot toast dish that's cozy and perfect for a Turkish-inspired breakfast or snack.
instructions: Slice the whole wheat bread into thin slices and place them on a baking sheet.
Mix beetroot, olive oil, sugar/honey, and vanilla extract in a small bowl. Pour this mixture over the sliced bread evenly, making sure each slice gets a bit of the beetroot mixture.
Sprinkle almond slivers (if using) on top of the beetroot mixture for added texture and flavor.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 10-15 minutes or until the toast turns golden brown and crispy. The outside should be slightly crisp while keeping the inside soft and tender.
Remove from the oven, let it cool a bit before serving.
